_comment: The three things scraped: 'companies' = who it was bought from (Shipping From), 'customers' = who it was sold to (Ship To), plus the Date (read automatically, not listed here). Copy this file to candidates.json and edit. Fuzzy matching normalizes OCR variants (e.g. 'T.J.MAXX DC # 897' -> 'TJ Maxx'). Confirm exact printed spellings against a real sample.
